caption: Meet Sophie. Spring sun filtered through the glass of the old library, casting warm amber and soft mint hues across the floor. I strolled through the hushed halls, my tailored blazer hugging every curve of my body, hiding my assets just enough to keep them burning under the fabric. Coffee steaming in my hand, I smiled, feeling the confidence of a woman who knows she's the most exciting part of the classroom. 📚☕ #UniversityTeacher #SpringGlow #SeductiveAcademics
